LIST ZONES

ZONE TZONE1   TARGET ZONE
ZONE TZONE2   TARGET ZONE

LIST DDDEF

ZONE TZONE1

DDNAME LINKLIB
  DSNAME SYS1.LINKLIB

ZONE TZONE2

DDNAME SITELIB
  DSNAME MY.SITE.LINKLIB

LIST FILE

ZONE TZONE1
IGYCRCTL   TYPE=MOD   FMID=HLA2280
IEBGENER   TYPE=MOD   FMID=HBB7790

ZONE TZONE2
SAMPMOD    TYPE=MOD   FMID=USER001

LIST SYSMOD

ZONE TZONE1
HLA2280   STATUS=APPLIED
HBB7790   STATUS=APPLIED

ZONE TZONE2
USER001   STATUS=APPLIED
